narrative: A Search Engineer at Verloop.io with four years of experience, coming from a product‑first environment, stands out for hands‑on work with retrieval‑focused tools such as Milvus, Qdrant and PEFT, plus solid TensorFlow and scikit‑learn deep‑learning experience. The primary driver of this ranking is the modest mismatch in experience level, as the role targets 5‑9 years. Nonetheless, the candidate’s proven ability to fine‑tune large language models for search relevance and to build vector‑based retrieval pipelines aligns tightly with the senior AI/ML search and retrieval responsibilities. Location in Mumbai is adjacent to the Pune/Noida hub, but the unknown notice period and the slight experience gap remain concerns.
